arts.ttl: Report: Real Madrid want to sign ‘extraordinary’ player who Aston Villa bid £29m for this summer
£80m price tag placed on Tottenham star to scare off Man City and Real Madrid
arts.sum: Tottenham have placed an £80m price tag on star defender Pedro Porro as the North London club try to fend off interest from Man City and Real Madrid in the Spanish star.
